title: Bind Bureau PR 653 to an honest R1 convergence closeout
goal: Create and evaluate a hash-bound R1 convergence request for Bureau PR 653 that binds the exact diff artifact, field review, CI, merge commit and this post-merge reconciliation task without pretending that the task authorized the already completed merge.

acceptance.assertion: The closeout states that T010 reconciles evidence after merge and does not claim to have authorized PR 653.
The request binds PR head 83cc1edfd0055c74b2767e106e4d45883e975682, merge commit 1ad4b644c615c616082d7e3275521bd85a926ea2 and protocol head 83ed435bf9eb490e81a6ff2103b6c1397440d40b.
The request binds field-review PASS, all five green GitHub checks and diff SHA-256 7460639c4e15ae1c8dc342552c3102844e782741107c70a32e4458dd85257f93.
The installed convergence-assess grip either returns terminally_closed with a receipt or blocks closeout with explicit missing or conflicting evidence; no status is fabricated.
The task is updated to verified only after the convergence receipt and Chronik event are persisted and validated.

metadata.source_observation: PR 653 was merged with complete technical evidence but no migration-specific Bureau task reference, which prevents an honest R1 terminal closeout until post-merge reconciliation is registered.
